name: taxipatch
description:
Patch for Crazy Taxi 3.
Includes fixes to resolution, frame rate, rendering, as well as other improvements.

name: ct3lib
description: Library & CLI for decoding and encoding Crazy Taxi 3 assets.

name: swarmbox
description:
CLI to simplify management of Docker Swarm clusters.
Parses modern Docker Compose features and transforms them into Swarm-compatible definitions.

name: ktgrants
description:
Experimental easy-to-use, readable permission modelling and management library.
As easy as `user.hasPermission { Read on post }`

name: ftprox
description: FTP proxy service that allows exposing servers hosted on cloud infrastructure, which may not have a static IP address.

name: ExtraSounds
description:
Minecraft mod that adds sound effects for UI interactions and more.
**1M+ downloads** on Modrinth.
Originally created by me, maintainership handed over to community developers.

name: CT3Tweaks
description: GUI for patching the Crazy Taxi 3 executable. Allows modifying the game's resolution, frame rate and FOV. Superseded by `taxipatch`.
